---
name: 💡 Feature Request — Profile Improvement
about: Suggest a new section, badge, animation, or design improvement for the profile
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "profile-improvement"]
assignees: ["saurabhcr007"]
---

## 💡 Feature / Improvement Idea

A clear and concise description of your suggestion.

## 🎯 Why Would This Improve the Profile?

Explain the value: does it improve recruiter readability? Add missing information? Improve visual design?

## 🖼️ Reference or Inspiration

Link to another GitHub profile, a badge service, a tool, or a screenshot that shows what you have in mind.

## 📦 Implementation Hint (optional)

If you know how to implement it, share the approach:
- Badge URL
- GitHub Action name
- SVG service
- Markdown snippet

## 🔍 Which Section Would This Affect?

- [ ] Header / Typing animation
- [ ] About Me
- [ ] Current Focus
- [ ] Tech Stack
- [ ] Featured Projects
- [ ] GitHub Analytics
- [ ] Learning Roadmap
- [ ] Certifications
- [ ] Connect / Social Links
- [ ] Footer
- [ ] New section (describe below)

## 📋 Additional Context

Any other information that would help evaluate this idea.
